name: Norfolk Community
description_short: Norfolk Community Federal Credit Union is a federally insured credit union offering checking, savings, debit/credit cards, loans, and mortgages to members in Massachusetts.
description_long:
Norfolk Community Federal Credit Union (NCFCU) is a member-owned financial cooperative headquartered in Norfolk, Massachusetts. As a federally chartered credit union, it operates under federal oversight and provides savings accounts insured up to $250,000 by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA). The institution has been serving its community with traditional financial services.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including savings and checking accounts, debit and credit cards (Mastercard), personal loans, mortgage services, and online banking through their Virtual Branch platform. Members can access BillPayer services for convenient bill payment, apply for mortgages and personal loans online, and manage their accounts through the AccessPoint platform. The organization maintains physical branch presence at their Norfolk, MA location while also offering digital banking options.

NCFCU distinguishes itself as a community-focused financial institution with limited physical locations and personalized member service. Their operations include standard credit union hours (Monday-Friday with Saturday morning hours), direct phone support, and email contact options. The institution maintains clear communication about federal insurance protection and operates with full transparency regarding routing numbers (211384861) and NMLS certification (507500).

As a small community credit union, NCFCU serves a localized membership base primarily in the Norfolk, Massachusetts area. Members should note that growth and service expansion appear limited compared to larger regional or national institutions. The organization follows standard federal holiday closings and maintains appropriate card fraud detection and member protection protocols, though detailed information about loan rates, product features, and membership eligibility requirements is not accessible from the contact page.
services: Savings accounts with NCUA federal insurance
Debit cards with card activation and fraud detection
Mastercard credit cards with activation and PIN services
Card management (activation, PIN changes, lost/stolen reporting)
pros: Federally insured deposits up to $250,000 backed by NCUA and U.S. government
Member-owned credit union structure typically offers lower fees than traditional banks
24/7 card management support with dedicated fraud detection hotline (888) 918-7313
Online banking and Virtual Branch platform for remote account management
Saturday morning hours (9am-12pm) provide weekend banking access
Comprehensive card services including Mastercard debit and credit cards
Direct mortgage and personal loan application options available online
cons: Single physical branch location limits accessibility for members outside Norfolk area
Limited information available about loan rates, terms, and product fees from website
Membership eligibility requirements not clearly specified on contact page
No apparent mention of competitive interest rates or yield on savings products
Small institution may offer fewer product variations compared to larger credit unions
best_for: Massachusetts residents in the Norfolk area seeking community-focused banking
Credit union members seeking federal deposit insurance and member ownership benefits
Individuals needing comprehensive banking with mortgage and personal loan services
Members prioritizing personal service and local financial institution relationships
diagnosis: Norfolk Community FCU is best for Massachusetts residents in the Norfolk area seeking traditional banking services from a federally insured, member-owned credit union. The main caveat is that detailed product information (rates, fees, eligibility) is not available on their website, requiring direct contact before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
